note: The routes configuration file is no longer used.
architecture: Copilot Monitor now uses a single --upstream flag to forward all requests.
why: The --upstream flag replaces the routes.json file. All incoming requests (except /_ping and /_health) are forwarded to the configured upstream host. Provider prefix stripping, per-route capture modes, and compression configuration have been removed in favor of this simpler model. An optional Headroom compression proxy can sit in front of Copilot Monitor; traffic arriving from Headroom is detected via RemoteAddr and flagged with headroom_proxied.
